Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Fix GPG signing by using a temporary GNUPGHOME directory (#304)

Replace the fragile `--delete-secret-and-public-key` cleanup with a
temporary `GNUPGHOME` directory that is wiped via `rm -rf` after signing.
Also pass the GPG private key via an env variable instead of interpolating
it directly into the shell command.

Co-authored-by: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix: link Telegram channel to existing contractor in single-tenant mode (#502)

When the web UI creates a contractor first and Telegram messages arrive
later, _get_or_create_contractor would create a second contractor because
the channel lookup found no match. The dashboard only shows sessions for
the first contractor, so Telegram sessions were invisible.

Now, when the channel lookup fails and exactly one contractor exists
(single-tenant OSS), the new channel is linked to that existing
contractor via the index instead of creating a duplicate.

Fixes #499

Drop stats table PK — Bakta reuses generic contig_N names across files

The stats table had PRIMARY KEY on seqid, but Bakta renames all reads to
contig_1, contig_2, etc., so only the first file's contigs were inserted.
This caused the viz to show 0.2 Gbp instead of the actual 6.6 Gbp.

feat: persist view state in URL hash (#57) (#62)

* feat: persist view state in URL hash (#57)

Read/write date, link visibility, and focused system to the URL hash
so users can share a specific view. Hash is written (debounced 500 ms)
on every relevant interaction and read back on page load to restore
state before the first render frame.

commit.message:
fix(docker): pass DEV_RESET_SECRET through Node.js env shim

The Node.js env shim (createNodeEnv) was not including DEV_RESET_SECRET
in the env object, so checkResetSecret() always returned false in Docker
E2E tests despite the env var being set in docker-compose.test.yml.

commit.message:
Fix CV editor save: remove required/email validation on data-only fields, prevent default on submit

The cv-name and cv-email fields don't have name attributes (they use data-field instead),
so their values are collected by JS into a hidden JSONB field. Having required and type=email
on these nameless fields caused browser validation to silently block form submission.

commit.message:
DataOrchestrator v2: 18 intelligence upgrades + Nova integration

DeepMind AI Perspective (intelligence quality):
- Confidence scoring (0.0-1.0) on every data point for Claude reasoning
- Computed insights layer: hiring_difficulty_index, salary_competitiveness,
  days_until_next_peak_hiring_window
- Session-scoped context accumulation across tool calls (EnrichmentContext)
- Additive cascade (merge research.py + API instead of first-wins)

Meta Data Science Perspective (data engineering at scale):
- ThreadPoolExecutor parallel fetches within enrich_* functions
- LRU cache with batch eviction and access tracking
- Input normalization before cache keys (prevents case-sensitivity misses)
- Request deduplication (in-flight coalescing via threading.Event)
- Fallback telemetry (tracks which queries hit generic fallback)
- Ad platform benchmarks passthrough (Google/Meta/LinkedIn CPC/CPM/CTR)

Additional UPGRADE_NEEDED items:
- Tier-aware salary fallback (executive/professional/skilled/entry)
- API return data validation before caching (prevents cache poisoning)
- Real-time job posting volume from Adzuna/Jooble
- Employer brand intelligence (30+ major employers from KNOWN_EMPLOYER_PROFILES)

Nova.py integration:
- 3 new Claude tools: query_employer_brand, query_ad_benchmarks,
  query_hiring_insights
- v2 metadata (confidence, freshness, sources) passed through all
  4 orchestrator-using tool handlers
- System prompt updated with new tools and confidence guidance

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Fix four A* call explosion patterns identified by audit

1. findOre 3-frame loop: guard with _prt cooldown, no state change on fail
2. atkReroute spam: skip fp() if unit already has non-empty path
3. Garrison patrol stuck-in-move: only enter move if fp() succeeds
4. AI garrison/idle enemy: guard fp() with _prt, set on failure

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

bump version to v1.17.30

feat: add transcription services with Whisper integration

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix: handle framework path prefixes and pass action to RouteDefinition

- RouteDefinition gains optional $action property for the framework's
  controller action string (e.g. UserController@store), set by route
  inspectors that have access to it
- LaravelRouteInspector now passes getActionName() as the action,
  enabling FormRequest discovery downstream in forge
- Version filter regex in ValidateCommand and VersionCommand no longer
  anchors to ^ so routes under /api/v1/ are matched correctly
- Rename --version option to --api-version to avoid collision with
  Artisan's built-in --version / -V flag

commit.message:
Add per-module mascots: Tropfi (water) and Zacki the croc (book)

- MASCOTS registry: SVG template function per module key, parametric
  gradient IDs so the same template is safely injected into all three
  SVG slots (home, quiz, results) without ID collisions
- swapMascot(moduleKey): replaces innerHTML of all three .tropfi SVGs;
  no-op guard avoids redundant DOM writes on repeated calls
- Zacki: green cartoon crocodile with protruding eye bumps, nostrils,
  and smile — coherent with Der Krokodildieb book theme
- goHome() calls swapMascot('water') → always restores Tropfi on water home
- enterModule() calls swapMascot(moduleId) in both branches so the
  mascot updates immediately on module entry, for all profiles

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

commit.message:
AI Scout: 2단계 지능형 메트릭 분석 시스템 구현

- ScoutAgent를 Discovery + Profile-based Monitoring 2단계로 리팩토링
  - 1단계: AI가 프로젝트 타입 인식 + 핵심 메트릭 자동 선정 + MXQL 쿼리 생성
  - 2단계: 선별된 메트릭만 모니터링, 임계값 초과 시에만 AI 호출 (경량화)
- MetricProfile 모델 추가 (AI가 생성한 모니터링 프로파일)
- Metric.rawData로 프로젝트 타입 무관 메트릭 보존
- WhatapApiClient에 getSpotRaw(), parseMetricWithRaw() 추가
- 동적 메트릭 카드 (monitor.html) — Browser/DB 등 비APM 프로젝트 지원
- AuthController에서 프로젝트 전환 시 프로파일 자동 리셋
- MonitorController에 /api/monitor/profile 엔드포인트 추가
- 사용자 가이드에 AI Scout 섹션 + 멀티 프로젝트 분석 사례 8건 추가

commit.message:
fix: ec_sort scatter race conditions causing column misalignment

Two race conditions in the scatter phase caused value columns to be
misaligned with key columns after sorting:

1. scatter_columns_direct: work items were (chunk, col, segment) triples
   running in parallel. With multiple input segments, different segments
   for the same column could flush in non-deterministic order, producing
   different row orderings per column within each bucket. Fix: restructure
   to one work item per column, each processing all segments sequentially.

2. invert_permutation: parallel chunks wrote columns 0 and 1 with two
   separate lock acquisitions, allowing interleaving. Fix: encode both
   columns outside the lock, then write both under a single lock via
   flush_paired_to_segment_writer.

Verified correct on 10M and 100M row SFrames.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

commit.message:
Add KuCoin fallback exchange for US-hosted servers

Binance and Bybit geo-block US IPs, causing 0/65 symbol fetches on
Railway (us-west2). KuCoin serves public OHLCV data from US without
restriction. Also reduces per-symbol log noise and adds
PYTHONUNBUFFERED for real-time Docker logging.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix: p_sync presence broadcast via Kademlia routing table instead of PBFT peers (v0.6.2)

- nodus_presence_tick() now iterates all routing table peers instead of PBFT peer list
- Reuses existing TCP connections (nodus_tcp_find_by_addr) before opening new ones
- p_sync handler validates sender IP against routing table instead of PBFT list
- peer_index computed as djb2(IP) % 254 + 1 for stable per-source dedup
